title: Conversation behavior lane precheck

risk_signals.evidence: core/framework/server/routes_execution.py constructs Message(... inherited_from=...) while local Message dataclass no longer exposed inherited_from field
risk_signals.impact: compact-and-fork / colony-fork summary message creation can raise TypeError at runtime

risk_signals.evidence: upstream conversation shape includes inherited_from/is_trigger persistence fields
risk_signals.impact: loss of cross-session provenance + trigger-banner metadata persistence if not restored

planned_validation: uv run --package framework pytest core/tests/test_event_loop_node.py core/tests/test_node_conversation.py -q
decision_gate: reconcile lane by restoring runtime metadata contract while keeping local conversation behavior
